headline: US oil inventories are now 7% below their 5-year average amid the Strait of Hormuz's months-long near-total closure
context: Crude stocks fell 6.1 million barrels to 412.1M in the week ended June 19, the third straight outsized weekly draw.
source: Source: EIA Weekly Petroleum Status Report, week ended June 19, 2026

headline: Core PCE — the Fed's preferred inflation gauge — just climbed to 3.4%, with 9 of 18 officials now penciling in a hike
context: That's up from 3.3% in April and nearly double the Fed's 2% target, keeping July rate-hike odds alive.
source: Source: U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis, May 2026 PCE report

headline: 3 tickers worth watching this week

items.reason: AeroVironment popped 30%+ on a blockbuster earnings beat and unusual volume — a clean breakout on defense-tech demand

headline: Consumer sentiment just cratered to 53.3 — deep in recession territory even as unemployment holds at 4.3%
context: The index has plunged as living costs outpace wage gains, even with a still-solid labor market underneath it.
source: Source: University of Michigan Surveys of Consumers, March 2026

headline: The average 401(k) saver now banks 14.4% of every paycheck — a record
context: Employee deferrals hit a record 9.6% on average, with auto-escalation driving 45% of savers to boost contributions this year.
